references.raw: base checkpoints of LLaMA-3.1-8B after vanilla safety tuning. COCA’s rates are in the same range as OpenAI’s frontier model. The GPT-4.5 system card (OpenAI, 2025) lists a 15% over-refusal rate on XsTesT. White-box Attac
